name: Better String
description: Given two strings str1 and str2, return the string that has the greater number of distinct subsequences. A subsequence is a sequence derived from another string by deleting some or no characters without changing the order. If both strings have the same number of distinct subsequences, return str1.

examples.output: "gfg" (gfg has 7 distinct subsequences: '', g, f, gf, fg, gg, gfg; ggg has 4: '', g, gg, ggg)

constraints: 1 <= str1.length, str2.length <= 30. Strings contain only lowercase English letters.

name: Rat in a Maze
description: Consider a rat placed at (0, 0) in a square matrix of order n x n. The rat has to reach the destination at (n-1, n-1). name: Reverse a Stack using Recursion
description: Given a stack, reverse the elements of the stack using only recursion. You are not allowed to use any loop constructs or extra data structures. You must use the call stack itself to reverse the elements in-place.
